Persist watch/unwatch to projects table

title: store: timestamp column type mismatch (INTEGER vs TEXT)
description: migrations.rs:88 creates timestamp as INTEGER but store.rs:76,125 and cache.rs:33 use TEXT with rfc3339. schema mismatch between migrations and runtime code.

title: Implement UnwatchProject method in socket.rs
description: socket.rs handle_request - UnwatchProject should remove project from watcher

title: Implement AST-based export extraction in analyzer.rs
description: analyzer.rs:56 - returns empty Vec, needs ast-grep integration to extract exports from parsed AST

title: store: cache serialization failures silently swallowed
description: cache.rs:143-145 unwrap_or_default() on serde errors. corrupted/unserializable analysis stored as empty string. on read returns empty vec, no way to detect corruption. should return Result or log warning.

title: Implement LLM-powered file analyzer for imports/exports/lint hints
description: Create llm_analyzer.rs with LlmFileAnalyzer struct for prompt building, response parsing, and FileAnalysis merging. Modify analyzer.rs to support LLM enhancement. Write TDD tests.

title: watcher: no symlink loop detection on recursive watch
description: recursive watch on directory with symlink loop (a->b->a) can cause infinite loop or crash. need depth limit or visited-set during recursive traversal.

title: Wire tool_runner attribution hook
description: when ai tool writes file -> no call to ambient_fs_attribute. when voice writes file -> no call to ambient_fs_attribute
close_reason: out of scope per CLAUDE.md - don't touch Kollabor app

title: store: duplicate project paths allowed (no UNIQUE constraint)
description: store.rs has no UNIQUE constraint on path column. same directory can be watched twice producing duplicate events. migrations.rs has UNIQUE on path but store.rs schema does not match.

title: Implement gateway relay for NAT traversal sync
description: P6-3: Stateless relay server that routes events between daemons that can't peer-to-peer. See docs/spec/missing/gateway-relay.md

title: Implement QueryAwareness method in socket.rs
description: socket.rs handle_request - QueryAwareness should query awareness data

title: Implement unwatch_project properly
description: server.rs:178 - only logs, doesn't actually unwatch path or update store

title: Integrate ContentDedup into watcher
description: watcher.rs never calls ContentDedup::hash_file, content_hash always None on emitted events

title: daemon: spawn_blocking tasks not awaited on shutdown
description: server.rs:254-260,679-683,746-750 spawn_blocking tasks are fire-and-forget. on shutdown, pending db writes can be lost. should track and await/abort on clean shutdown.

title: Implement incremental tree patching
description: tree.rs has low-level ops but not connected. no server-side project tree state, no protocol method for tree query

title: node client: add query_agents() method
Refactor socket.rs to support shared server state
close_reason: refactored socket.rs with shared ServerState. ServerState created with store_path, subscriptions, projects. SocketServer gained state field + set_state(). handle_connection/handle_request now take state. DaemonServer creates and passes ServerState. note: ambient-fs-server has unrelated compile errors in agents.rs (duplicate fields) that were not part of this task.

title: Implement cross-machine sync
description: no gRPC SyncEvents stream, no remote machine tracking

title: Implement Node.js client library
Fix cache validation with content_hash
description: file_analysis PK is (project_id, file_path) not including content_hash. cache.get() returns analysis without checking hash. FileAnalysis::is_valid_for() exists but unused

title: Implement awareness change subscription notifications
description: P3-3: Extend SubscriptionManager to emit AwarenessChanged notifications, not just raw FileEvents. See docs/spec/missing/awareness-subscription.md

title: Define active_agent claim/release protocol
description: Superseded by agent-activity-protocol.md (JSONL watching approach). See docs/spec/missing/agent-activity-protocol.md. Original claim/release design in docs/spec/missing/active-agent-protocol.md kept for reference.

title: Implement attribution API
description: no attribute method in protocol.rs, no handler in socket.rs, no client method in client.rs, explicit attribution writes not implemented

title: watcher: git detection timing window flawed
description: attribution.rs:156-166 uses 3-second window after git index mtime. too narrow for slow git ops, too wide for fast ones. also attribution.rs:159 duration_since() fails silently on future mtime (NFS/VM clock skew).

title: client: pending map not drained on reader task panic
description: client.rs:278-281 if reader task panics before cleanup block, pending map entries leak. callers hang forever on oneshot::recv. Drop only aborts reader, doesn't drain pending.

title: Implement linter hints integration
description: analyzer.rs:65 - returns empty Vec, needs integration with linter to provide hints

title: server: unix socket created with permissive permissions
description: socket file created with default umask (0o777 effective). any user on the system can connect to daemon and read file events. should restrict to 0o700. file: socket.rs

title: Create Tauri plugin skeleton
description: integrations/tauri-plugin-ambient-fs/ is empty. no lib.rs, bridge.rs, plugin init

title: Implement active agent protocol
description: no protocol method to set active agent, no subscription broadcast of agent state, no timeout/clear when agent finishes. field exists but no API to populate it
close_reason: Superseded by agent-activity-protocol, implemented by Phase2-AgentTracker agent

title: all clients: add watch_agents/unwatch_agents/report_agent_activity
server: inconsistent param validation across handlers
description: some handlers validate project_id, others don't. unpredictable errors for clients. different error messages for same type of missing param. file: socket.rs multiple handlers

title: server: test temp socket files leak on panic

title: Implement Subscribe method in socket.rs
description: socket.rs handle_request - Subscribe should validate params, subscribe to project via SubscriptionManager

title: Wire analysis pipeline: watcher events -> analyzer -> cache -> broadcast
description: P2-3: When file created/modified, run tier 1 analysis, cache result, optionally schedule LLM tier 2. See docs/spec/missing/analysis-pipeline.md

title: watcher: dedup non-atomic metadata read
description: dedup.rs:64 reads file metadata (mtime, size) non-atomically. file could change between stat calls. low risk since dedup is best-effort.

title: store: no busy_timeout configured on sqlite
description: store.rs:66-117 WAL mode enabled but no busy_timeout. concurrent writes can fail with SQLITE_BUSY. add conn.busy_timeout(Duration::from_secs(5)).

title: rust client: close() + Drop impl for clean shutdown
watcher: watched directory deletion not handled
description: if watched directory is deleted, watcher emits events for contained files but watch remains active. re-creation of directory is not watched. should detect deletion and auto-re-arm or emit special event.

title: client: notification drops on full buffer (by design)
description: client.rs:248-258 try_send drops notifications when buffer full. documented behavior but no backpressure. consider logging dropped count or increasing default buffer.

title: client: id wraparound at u64::MAX breaks response routing
description: fetch_add(1, Relaxed) at u64::MAX wraps to 0. json id:0 is confused with no-id by as_u64() check in reader task. response routing silently breaks. file: client.rs:435

title: Create launchd and systemd service files with install/uninstall CLI
description: Auto-start daemon on login. Plist for macOS, systemd user service for Linux. CLI: ambient-fsd install-service / uninstall-service. See docs/spec/missing/service-files.md

title: server: 80 lines duplicated request handling code
description: socket.rs:244-367 has_subscriptions vs no-subscriptions branches duplicate request parsing and handling. maintenance burden, branches can diverge. extract to shared function.

title: Implement Unsubscribe method in socket.rs
description: socket.rs handle_request - Unsubscribe should unsubscribe from project

title: daemon: PID file race between fork and child write
description: daemon.start() forks, parent exits immediately. child writes PID file after fork. window where no PID file exists allows second daemon instance to start. file: daemon.rs:212-216

title: Persist machine_id to config

title: daemon: config.toml created with default umask (0644)
